expertAssessments.rationale: Production UI prompt, response rendering, analysis basis, and fullscreen restore covered the changed AI assistant surface; deterministic tests cover the new agent-step contract.
Version, health, Cloud Run health, runtime limits, job stream resource timing, and GitLab deploy pipeline were verified.
The QA prompt was submitted through the UI path with CSRF intact; no direct API bypass was used.
GitLab main validation, semver tag deploy pipeline, Vercel production version, and Cloud Run health all passed.
Release QA combines deterministic local contract tests, GitLab CI evidence, and Playwright MCP production UI smoke.
Dashboard 18-server status and AI response both reflected the current static OTel production dataset without warning/risk drift.
